02257|   const calculatePnl = (currentValue: number, tokens: Array<{ symbol: string; valueUsd: number; address: string; chainId: number }>) => {
02258|     const storedCosts = secureStorage.getItem<Record<string, number>>(`token_costs_${address}`) || {}
02259|     
02260|     let totalCost = 0
02261|     const tokenPnls: Array<{ symbol: string; pnl: number; percentage: number }> = []
02262|     
02263|     for (const token of tokens) {
02264|       const key = `${token.chainId}_${token.address}`
02265|       const cost = storedCosts[key] || token.valueUsd
02266|       totalCost += cost
02267|       
02268|       const pnl = token.valueUsd - cost
02269|       const percentage = cost > 0 ? (pnl / cost) * 100 : 0
02270|       
02271|       tokenPnls.push({
02272|         symbol: token.symbol,
02273|         pnl,
02274|         percentage
02275|       })
02276|     }
02277|     
02278|     const totalPnl = currentValue - totalCost
02279|     const totalPercentage = totalCost > 0 ? (totalPnl / totalCost) * 100 : 0
02280|     
02281|     return {
02282|       total: totalPnl,
02283|       percentage: totalPercentage,
02284|       tokens: tokenPnls.sort((a, b) => Math.abs(b.pnl) - Math.abs(a.pnl)).slice(0, 5)
02285|     }
02286|   }
02287|

02334|   const revokeApproval = async (approval: typeof approvals[0]) => {
02335|     if (!address || !revokeChain) return
02336|     setIsRevoking(true)
02337|     try {
02338|       if (connectedChainId !== revokeChain.id) {
02339|         await switchChain({ chainId: revokeChain.id })
02340|         await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500))
02341|       }
02342|       const { sendTransaction: sendTx, waitForTransactionReceipt } = await import('wagmi/actions')
02343|       const { wagmiConfig } = await import('@/lib/blockchain/wagmi')
02344|       const hash = await sendTx(wagmiConfig, {
02345|         to: approval.token.address as `0x${string}`,
02346|         data: `0x095ea7b3${approval.spender.slice(2).padStart(64, '0')}${'0'.padStart(64, '0')}` as `0x${string}`,
02347|         chainId: revokeChain.id as (8453 | 84532 | 1 | 56 | 42161 | 80094 | 43114 | 999 | 137 | 10 | 59144 | 534352 | 5000 | 130 | 360 | 98866),
02348|       })
02349|       toast.info('Revoke submitted, confirming...')
02350|       await waitForTransactionReceipt(wagmiConfig, { hash })
02351|       setApprovals(prev => prev.filter(a =>
02352|         !(a.token.address.toLowerCase() === approval.token.address.toLowerCase() &&
02353|           a.spender.toLowerCase() === approval.spender.toLowerCase())
02354|       ))
02355|       toast.success('Approval revoked')
02356|     } catch (error) {
02357|       const msg = error instanceof Error ? error.message.toLowerCase() : ''
02358|       if (!msg.includes('user rejected') && !msg.includes('user denied')) {
02359|         toast.error('Failed to revoke approval')
02360|       }
02361|     } finally {
02362|       setIsRevoking(false)
02363|     }
02364|   }
02365| 
02366|   const batchRevokeApprovals = async () => {
02367|     if (!address || !revokeChain || selectedApprovals.size === 0) return
02368|     setIsRevoking(true)
02369|     try {
02370|       if (connectedChainId !== revokeChain.id) {
02371|         await switchChain({ chainId: revokeChain.id })
02372|         await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500))
02373|       }
02374|       const { sendTransaction: sendTx, waitForTransactionReceipt } = await import('wagmi/actions')
02375|       const { wagmiConfig } = await import('@/lib/blockchain/wagmi')
02376| 
02377|       const selectedApprovalsArray = Array.from(selectedApprovals).map(idx => approvals[idx])
02378|       let successCount = 0
02379|       let failCount = 0
02380|       const revokedKeys = new Set<string>()
02381| 
02382|       for (let i = 0; i < selectedApprovalsArray.length; i++) {
02383|         const approval = selectedApprovalsArray[i]
02384|         try {
02385|           toast.info(`Revoking ${i + 1}/${selectedApprovalsArray.length}: ${approval.token.symbol}...`)
02386|           const hash = await sendTx(wagmiConfig, {
02387|             to: approval.token.address as `0x${string}`,
02388|             data: `0x095ea7b3${approval.spender.slice(2).padStart(64, '0')}${'0'.padStart(64, '0')}` as `0x${string}`,
02389|             chainId: revokeChain.id as (8453 | 84532 | 1 | 56 | 42161 | 80094 | 43114 | 999 | 137 | 10 | 59144 | 534352 | 5000 | 130 | 360 | 98866),
02390|           })
02391|           await waitForTransactionReceipt(wagmiConfig, { hash })
02392|           revokedKeys.add(`${approval.token.address.toLowerCase()}:${approval.spender.toLowerCase()}`)
02393|           successCount++
02394|           console.log(`Revoked ${approval.token.symbol}:`, hash)
02395|         } catch (error) {
02396|           const msg = error instanceof Error ? error.message.toLowerCase() : ''
02397|           if (msg.includes('user rejected') || msg.includes('user denied')) {
02398|             toast.error('Revoke cancelled')
02399|             break
02400|           }
02401|           console.error(`Failed to revoke ${approval.token.symbol}:`, error)
02402|           failCount++
02403|         }
02404|       }
02405| 
02406|       if (revokedKeys.size > 0) {
02407|         setApprovals(prev => prev.filter(a =>
02408|           !revokedKeys.has(`${a.token.address.toLowerCase()}:${a.spender.toLowerCase()}`)
02409|         ))
02410|       }
02411| 
02412|       if (successCount > 0) toast.success(`Revoked ${successCount} approval${successCount > 1 ? 's' : ''}`)
02413|       if (failCount > 0) toast.error(`Failed to revoke ${failCount} approval${failCount > 1 ? 's' : ''}`)
02414| 
02415|       setSelectedApprovals(new Set())
02416|     } catch (error) {
02417|       console.error('Batch revoke failed:', error)
02418|       toast.error('Failed to revoke approvals')
02419|     } finally {
02420|       setIsRevoking(false)
02421|     }
02422|   }
02423| 
02424|   const toggleApprovalSelection = (idx: number) => {

02427|       newSelected.delete(idx)
02428|     } else {
02429|       newSelected.add(idx)
02430|     }
02431|     setSelectedApprovals(newSelected)
02432|   }
02433|

02435|     if (selectedApprovals.size === approvals.length) {

02463|   const shareSwapReceipt = (swap: SwapHistory) => {
02464|     const text = `Just swapped ${swap.fromAmount} ${swap.fromTokenSymbol} (${swap.fromChain}) to ${swap.toAmount} ${swap.toTokenSymbol} (${swap.toChain}) on Relay!`

02469|   const switchChains = () => {
02470|     const temp = fromChain
02471|     setFromChain(toChain)
02472|     setToChain(temp)
02473|     
02474|     const tempToken = fromToken
02475|     setFromToken(toToken)
02476|     setToToken(tempToken)
02477|     
02478|     const tempAmount = fromAmount

02480|     setToAmount(tempAmount)
02481|

02485|     }

02490|       const connector = connectors.find(c => c.id === 'io.metamask' || c.id === 'injected') || connectors[0]
02491|       if (connector) {
